weaknesses: Few mentions of enterprise/OEM or investor domain
Limited explicit pre-sales or sales collaboration
improvement_bullets: Collaborated with cross-functional stakeholders including product leadership and technical decision-makers to design scalable data analytical frameworks, ensuring alignment with enterprise-level business objectives.
Led technical pre-sales initiatives by orchestrating end-to-end POCs and building custom data prototypes to demonstrate clear commercial impact and value proposition to enterprise stakeholders.

Engineered and integrated ETL pipelines connecting API and cloud-based data sources, advising on refresh cadence and optimized consumption patterns within modern data warehouses like Snowflake and BigQuery.
Partnered with Sales and R&D teams to identify high-value industry use-cases, transforming complex requirements into actionable technical briefs and long-term data strategy roadmaps.
Defined and implemented data integration strategies for diverse clients, effectively managing risks, technical dependencies, and production deployments in complex, high-stakes environments.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Strategist - Data Strategy & Integration opportunity with Similarweb. I am interested in this opportunity because of Similarweb’s unparalleled ability to distill the complexity of the digital world into actionable intelligence for global enterprises. What interests me about working for Similarweb is your product-first culture; the fact that 99% of employees cite the product as a reason for joining resonates with me as a data professional who values high-impact, high-utility tools. I believe my technical fluency in Python and SQL and my background in cross-functional stakeholder management would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by bridging the gap between raw data and commercial strategy. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I acted as an internal consultant for our leadership, where I identified that our client onboarding and lead generation were bottlenecked by manual data processing. I architected a solution using Python and Zapier to automate these workflows and developed Power BI dashboards to translate complex performance metrics into clear, executive-level insights. This resulted in an 8-hour per week time savings and a 300% increase in new customer acquisition. Ultimately, I know that the Data Strategist - Data Strategy & Integration role at Similarweb would allow me to bring my data modeling and prototyping skills to help your enterprise clients operationalize their insights. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my technical project management and integration skills. I led collaborations across Underwriting and Product teams to align software features with business objectives, using JIRA and Confluence to manage complex dependencies and ensure on-time delivery. By optimizing relational database queries and unifying data from APIs and PostgreSQL, I reduced project delivery delays by 25%. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in cloud-based data integration in working on your client-facing technical initiatives at Similarweb. I know that my technical proficiency and analytical rigor align with what it takes to succeed at the Data Strategist - Data Strategy & Integration role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
